channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Furniture and rubbish dumped, 31st March
item.description:
Furniture and rubbish has been dumped outside priestly close Ravensdale Road and at various other places on Ravensdale Road. This has become e regular occurance

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ravensdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter all over path, 31st March
item.description:
Littered path

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflowing bin and litter everywhere, 31st March
item.description:
Hi there, The bus stop next to M&S on Woolwich Road is constantly overflowing and there ya plenty for f litter all around. Please increase your services in that area as it looks discussing most of the time. Your street service is close to non-existing atm. I've never lived in such badly managed borough in London.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dupree Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The young tree is dead, 31st March
item.description:
The young tree never thrived as we think it was not planted deep enough. It is now loose and dead and will need replacing or removing.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Brabourne Rise, Park Langley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Piles of rotting leaves, 31st March
item.description:
I have reported this twice now and each time I get a reply that the problem is fixed! IT IS NOT FIXED! And never has been.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterdale Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip in Chequers Way N13 6DA, 31st March
item.description:
This rubbish has been dumped all around the junction of Chequers Way & Tottenhall Rd near the phone box

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tottenhall Road, Palmers Green
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Gurdon Road - constantly overflowing bin, 31st March
item.description:
Hi there, These bins meant to be changed daily - this has not been done since Friday! Greenwich council, please start providing proper street service, this is shocking now with your recent council tax increase. Best,

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dupree Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and smelly stuff in ,and on top of, metal bin cupboards., 31st March
item.description:
This has been here for months and months. Please can it be cleared properly. It smells and is unsightly. Is there another company that is responsible for cleaning this that I should contact?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 174, High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Plant a tree, 31st March
item.description:
The corner could do with some love

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Saxon Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Office chair dumped, 31st March
item.description:
Has been here for months

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Park Avenue, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street rarely swept, 31st March
item.description:
General litter always down Beechwood Road. Street sweeper hides in the Rhodes Estate car park on his phone

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beechwood Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 31st March
item.description:
Graffiti on exchange box

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Morgan Road, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Glass and rubbish, 31st March
item.description:
There is broken glass outside the Phoneix pub and constant litter, same applies along the windsor walk
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Windsor Walk, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
